1471030756913578105.content: Hey Ayush! 👋 You just sent '456'. Is that a test or do you need something specific?
Hey Ayush! 👋 You just sent '123890'. Is that a test or do you need something specific?

999 emergency telephone number ki shuruat United Kingdom mein hui thi. Isse pehle, 1937 mein London Metropolitan Police ne 999 ko pehla universal emergency number banaya tha, jabki usse pehle koi ek standardized number nahi tha. Idea aaya tha ki koi bhi kisi bhi phone se 999 dial karke police, fire ya medical services ko instant call kar sakta hai. Baad mein kai dusre deshon ne bhi apne emergency numbers adopt kiye, jaise US mein 911, Europe mein 112, etc. Agar aapke koi aur sawal ho to poochiye!
999 number in this discord server kisne likha tha general channel mein
Ayush, tumne hi general channel mein '999 number kisne likha tha?' likha tha — yeh pichhli conversation mein dekh sakte ho (00:51:03 par tumne yeh message bheja tha).
kya tum btaoge ki 19 april ka one of first message kya and kis text channel mein likha hua tha?

Ayush, main abhi tak ke server ke poore message history ko access nahi kar sakta, lekin jo pichhli conversation ke logs mein dikh raha hai uske according:

- Sabse pehla message jo dikh raha hai woh aapka '456' tha, jise aapne 00:13:16 par bheya tha.
- Uske baad mere reply aaye, phir aapka '123890' (00:42:44), fir mere reply, etc.

Yeh sab messages konsi channel mein the, woh logs mein nahi likha, lekin pichhli baat-chit mein aapne 'general' channel ka jikar kiya hai, aur yeh samajh mein aata hai ki shuruati messages bhi yahi channel mein ho sakte hain.

Agar aapko 19 April ki specific date ke pehले messages ka precise pata chahiye, toh Discord ka Audit Log ya Server Insights use karna padega — wahan se aap date/time filter lagakar exact message aur uski channel dekh sakte hain.

Koi aur sawal ho to poochiye!
nehi general text channel mein btao, 19 april ka one of first message kya tha

Ayush, main abhi tak ke server ke poore message history ko access nahi kar sakta. Jo pichhli conversation ke logs mein dikh raha hai uske according, sabse pehla message jo visible hai woh aapka '456' tha (00:13:16). Uske baad mere reply aaye, phir aapka '123890' (00:42:44), etc.

Yeh sab messages konsi channel mein the, woh logs mein nahi likha, lekin pichhli baat-chit mein aapne 'general' channel ka jikar kiya hai, aur yeh samajh mein aata hai ki shuruati messages bhi yahi channel mein ho sakte hain.

Agar aapko 19 April ki specific date ke pehle messages ka precise pata chahiye, toh Discord ka Audit Log ya Server Insights use karna padega — wahan se aap date/time filter lagakar exact message aur uski channel dekh sakte hain.

Koi aur sawal ho to poochiye!
fine, ye btao ki general text chat mein kon kon se channel delete hua hain like unka message kya kya tha vo bhi btao and kisne kha tha delete kerne ko vo bhi

Ayush, main abhi tak ke server ke deleted channels ya unke message history ko directly access nahi kar sakta. Discord ki built-in audit log ya server insights mein jaakar aap dekh sakte hain ki kis channel ko delete kiya gaya, kisne kiya, aur kab kiya. Wahan se aap timestamp filter lagakar bhi dekh sakte hain ki kis message ko delete kiya gaya tha (agar uska log available ho).

Agar aapko specific date (19 April) ke pehle deleted general text channel ke baare mein jaanna hai, toh:
1. Server Settings → Audit Log → Filter: Delete Channel action.
2. Wahan se date/time range select karke 19 April ke pehle ki entries dekhein.
3. Agar aapko deleted messages ki jaankari chahiye, toh Audit Log mein 'Message Delete' action check karein (agar server mein Message Logging enabled ho).

Main abhi tak ke logs mein jo messages visible hain, unke according sabse pehla message aapka '456' tha (00:13:16) uske baad '123890' (00:42:44) etc. Lekin deleted channels ya unke purane messages ka detail main nahi de sakta.

Koi aur sawal ho to poochiye!
